rulings.Case Title: STURGES VS A P GREEN INDUSTRIES INC*
HARVEY VS ABB LUMMUS GLOBAL, INC*
HARVEY VS ABB LUMMUS GLOBAL, INC*
rulings.Calendar Matter: Mtn For Summary Adjudication Re:Civil Code Section 1714.45 Immunity

rulings.Rulings: NESTLE'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT GRANTED. NO TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT RE NESTLE OR CARNATION'S CONTOL OF PREMISES WHERE PLAINTIFF WORKED FOR SUBCONTRACTOR. (LC(EX)

DENY MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT AND GRANT MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IN PART. DENY AS TO CAUSES OF ACTION 1, 3, 4, 5, & 7. TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT RE DISCRIMINATION, FAILURE TO ACCOMODATE, FAILURE TO TAKE CORRECTIVE ACTION, AND FAILURE TO PREVENT. GRANT AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION 2. NO TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT RE HARASSMENT BECAUSE PLAINTIFF CITES PERSONNEL CONDUCT AND COMMENT THAT PLAINTIFF IS SHORT AND HAS SKINNY LEGS IS ISOLATED AND TRIVIAL. GRANT AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION 6. NO CAUSAL NEXUS AND NO ADVERSE EMPLOYMENT ACTION. GRANT AS TO CAUSES OF ACTION 8 & 9 BECAUSE NO FRAUD. UNDISPUTED THAT DEFENDANT ACCOMMODATED PLAINTIFF FOR 2 YEARS AFTER THE TRANSFER AND NO EVIDENCE THAT TRANSFER DID NOT COMPORT WITH ANTI-NEPOTISM POLICY. GRANT AS TO CAUSES OF ACTION 10 & 11 AS UNOPPOSED. INDIVIDUAL DEFENDANTS DISMISSED IN ENTIRETY UNDER RENO V. BAIRD. (PB)

rulings.Calendar Matter: ADDED TO LAW AND MOTION CALENDAR FOR Renotice Of Motion For Good Faith Determination
rulings.Rulings: GRANT MOTION OF ISG INTERNATIONAL FOR DETERMINATION THAT SETTLEMENT WAS MADE IN GOOD FAITH. (CW)

rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Motion To Continue Trial Date
rulings.Rulings: OFF CALENDAR, MOTIONS TO CONTINUE THE TRIAL DATE SHOULD BE MADE BEFORE THE PRESIDING JUDGE IN DEPT. 206.

rulings.Rulings: HEARING REQUIRED RE STATUS OF PLEADING AND SUPPLEMENTAL BRIEFING IN LIGHT OF ORDER ALLOWING FILING OF SECOND AMENDED CROSS-COMPLAINT. (CW)

rulings.Rulings: OFF CALENDAR, DISCOVERY MATTER. PLEASE CALL & CALENDAR IN THAT DEPT.

rulings.Case Title: THE HOUSING GROUP V. UNITED NATIONAL INSURANCE COMPANY
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION Notice Of Petition For Order; (1) To Determine Arbitrator'S Jurisdiction To Issue Award After Arbitration; And (2) That United National And Generali Have No Right To Prevent Petitioners Form Obtaining
rulings.Rulings: PETITION TO DETERMINE ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION GRANTED ON CONDITION SCOTTSDALE IS SERVED WITH ORDER AND IS PROVIDED WITH AN OPPORTUNITY TO APPEAR AND OBJECT WITHIN 20 DAYS. IF NO OBJECTION ORDER BECOMES FINAL AND ARBITRATOR LYNCH HAS AUTHORITY TO ISSUE DECISION RE PETITIONER'S ENTITLEMENT TO FUNDS FROM SCOTTSDALE FUND. REQUEST FOR DECLARATORY RELIEF RE ABILITY OF UNITED TO OBJECT DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. (CW)

rulings.Rulings: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT BY PLAINTIFF GRANTED AS TO BOTH DEFENDANTS. (PB)

rulings.Case Title: ANNIE C YUEN VS. JOHN GARY PETTINGER et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Demurrer To Complaint And Motion To Strike
rulings.Rulings: DEMURRER OVERRULED. DESCRIPTION OF PROPERTY WHERE OWNER RESIDES AND OWNS DOES NOT NEED TO BE IN NOTICE BUT CAN BE PROVIDED SEPARATELY IN WRITING SEE 37.9B(C) SF ADMINISTRATIVE CODE. MOTION TO STRIKE GRANTED, NO OPPOSITION FILED. (CW)
CONTINUED TO 2-20-02 PER STIPULATION AND AMENDED NOTICE.
